MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Carla Contreras, Susan Lee/Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Tamara Rosselli, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Attorney, Arnold Walter Evje, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Steven Amuso, is present.
Attorney, Naoki Kaneko, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
